name: giosk
description: OBA Weekend-thon Giosk, one root project that orchestrates the internal A/B/C/D services.

scripts.health: node scripts/root-env.mjs npm --prefix voice-adaptive-kiosk run health
scripts.prewarm:ggui: node scripts/root-env.mjs npm --prefix voice-adaptive-kiosk run prewarm:ggui
scripts.probe:ggui: node scripts/root-env.mjs npm --prefix voice-adaptive-kiosk run probe:ggui
scripts.screenshot: node scripts/root-env.mjs npm --prefix voice-adaptive-kiosk run screenshot
scripts.test:a: cd voice-adaptive-kiosk/module-a && PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
scripts.verify: npm run test:root && npm --prefix voice-adaptive-kiosk run verify && npm run test:a
